$comment: Hand-curated operator address clusters. Each cluster links an attribution-anchored wallet (Lazarus subgroup, Pink Drainer, etc.) to the incidents it touched. Loaded by scripts/seed-curated-operator-clusters.ts which (1) upserts the address with the curated label + role=subject, and (2) links it to every matching intel row by publicId or headlineContains. Headlines mutate over time — prefer publicIds where you have them. Run with --dry-run to preview before writing.

clusters.operator: Lazarus Group — Bybit / WazirX / DMM / Radiant operator
clusters.label: Lazarus Group (TraderTraitor) — 2024-25 placed-operator cluster
clusters.$todo: Fill `addresses` with the FBI-published operator wallets across ETH/Solana/Tron — see https://www.ic3.gov/Media/Y2025/PSA250226

addresses.$note: Headlined in the 81-wallet investigation — confirm exact deployer address before seeding.
Replace with the exact 42-char address — the 'aAaAaAaA' suffix is the vanity tail, the front needs the precise hex.
